_comment: jadx-parity RATCHET baseline. The automatic convergence gate: a decompiler change must not drop type_jaccard below the floor or push ours_invalid_java above the ceiling (regression). A port that IMPROVES convergence raises type_jaccard — then RATCHET the floor up to the new value here (a coverage-ratchet). jadx-version-pinned: measured with the pinned jadx; a different jadx yields a different reference, so the test SKIPS on a version mismatch instead of false-failing.
